content:
✨ Continuum | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable persistent, collaborative AI coding agent workflows by providing a shared, live codebase context and inter-agent memory.
✨ Key Features: • Live code graph with tree-sitter parsing for multiple languages • Hybrid code search combining lexical (BM25) and semantic (model2vec) search • Code navigation features (definitions, callers, dependency graphs)
📖 Summary: Continuum is a persistent, multi-agent Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed to provide AI coding agents with a shared, live view of a codebase and a long-term memory. It allows multiple agents to collaborate on a project, maintaining context and state across sessions and agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
